premise: A fashion teaser short first withholds the wearer by showing only a gray knit garment in close-up, then reveals a single adult female lead modeling the matching outfit against the same plain wall.

cast.description: One adult female lead is the only implied person in the package; scene_001 shows only her hands, while scene_002 shows the full reveal.

continuity_rules: Only one adult female lead is needed. Do not add friends, stylists, partners, parents, or alternate-age variants.
Scene_001 must stay a hands-only teaser shot; do not reveal the face or torso until scene_002.
Scene_001 should be treated as a prop-only teaser when prompting; do not attach face or full-body identity references to that scene.
The same minimal warm off-white wall and soft indoor lighting should carry across both scenes.
The gray garment shown in scene_001 must clearly connect to the gray tube-top styling in scene_002.
No intentional on-screen text is required in the remake. Remove any visible brand tag, watermark, or source artifacts.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: The full story is a single-performer fashion reveal. No additional cast is implied by the source video.

scene_arc.beat: Tease the garment in close-up without revealing the wearer.
Pay off the tease with a quick identity-locked outfit reveal.
